name: sutra
description: Sutra — Operating system for building with AI. Input routing, depth estimation, readability gate, output trace. Opinionated governance for Claude Code sessions.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Sutra Core — governance primitives: input routing, depth estimation, readability gate, output trace + v2.6 PROTO-024 V1 client→team feedback fanout (collaborator-visible inbox; V2 will encrypt) + Tier 1.6 Trust Mode permissions + strengthened scrub (12+ token detectors + entropy fallback). Hooks warn when depth marker is missing before Edit/Write; estimation metrics on session end; reset-turn-markers fires on Stop event (spoof-safe). Includes session-retrieve for recovering abruptly-closed sessions. Privacy: see ~/.sutra/PRIVACY.md; opt out with SUTRA_TELEMETRY=0; feedback fanout opt-out via SUTRA_FEEDBACK_FANOUT=0 or ~/.sutra-feedback-fanout-disabled.
